Metadata.defaultTitle: Mateo Guillén — Web development, SEO and Google Ads
Metadata.defaultDescription: Freelance web developer. I build landing pages, advanced websites and online stores, and manage your SEO, Google Analytics and Google Ads.

Footer.tagline: Web development and digital marketing for businesses that want to grow online.

hero.title: Websites that load fast, rank well, and turn visits into customers
hero.subtitle: I design and build your landing page, website or online store, then make it visible: SEO, Google Analytics and Google Ads managed end to end.

trust.title: One provider for everything digital
items: Clear Analytics and Ads reports, no jargon

servicesTeaser.title: Services
servicesTeaser.subtitle: From the first line of code to the first conversion.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.description: We talk about your business, goals and budget. I propose the exact scope of the project.

steps.title: Design and build
steps.description: I build the site or campaign with visible progress, so you can give feedback at every stage.

steps.title: Launch
steps.description: I deploy to production, connect Analytics, and make everything measurable from the first visitor.

steps.title: Growth
steps.description: SEO and Google Ads so the site keeps bringing in customers after delivery.

projectsTeaser.title: Real projects, not mockups
projectsTeaser.subtitle: A few sites and systems I designed and built for clients.

aboutTeaser.title: Developer, not just a designer
aboutTeaser.description: I treat code, load speed, technical SEO and analytics as part of the same project, not separate add-ons. That's why your site doesn't just look good: it works.

cta.title: Have a project in mind?
cta.subtitle: Tell me what you need and I'll get back to you with a concrete proposal in under 48 hours.

Services.indexTitle: I build your website and help it grow
Services.indexDescription: Two fronts, one goal: more sales for your business online. Web development on one side, SEO and advertising on the other.
Services.detailCtaSubtitle: Tell me about your project and I'll send you a tailored proposal.

landing.title: Landing Pages
landing.shortDescription: A page focused on a single goal: turning visits into leads or sales.
landing.description: I design fast, conversion-focused landing pages: to launch a product, capture leads or promote a specific offer. Ideal if you need an online presence without the complexity of a full site.
features: Built-in contact or lead capture form
Fast loading and SEO best practices from the start
Google Analytics integration to track results

web-avanzada.title: Advanced Websites
web-avanzada.shortDescription: Multi-page sites with sections, blog, dashboards or custom features.
web-avanzada.description: I build complete websites for companies, professionals or institutions: multiple pages, blog, advanced forms, integrations with external systems and admin panels when needed.
features: Custom site architecture (multiple pages and sections)
Blog or news section with content management
Integrations with APIs, CRMs or third-party tools
Admin panel when the project requires it

ecommerce.title: Online Stores (E-commerce)
ecommerce.shortDescription: Full online stores: catalog, cart, payments and order management.
ecommerce.description: I build custom online stores or on top of robust platforms, with product catalog, shopping cart, payment gateway and order management, designed to make managing your inventory simple.
features: Product catalog with categories and variants
SEO for product pages and categories

seo.title: Website SEO
seo.shortDescription: Optimization so your site shows up when your customers search on Google.
seo.description: I work on your site's technical and content SEO: load speed, structure, metadata, structured data and keyword strategy, to steadily improve your organic ranking.
features: Speed and Core Web Vitals optimization

google-analytics.title: Google Analytics Management
google-analytics.shortDescription: I set up and manage your Google Analytics so you get clear, actionable data.
google-analytics.description: I set up Google Analytics 4 from scratch or review your current setup: events, conversions and custom dashboards, so you know exactly where your visitors come from and what they do on your site.
features: Linking with Google Search Console and Google Ads

google-ads.title: Google Ads Management
google-ads.shortDescription: Search and display campaigns managed to attract qualified customers.
google-ads.description: I create and manage your Google Ads campaigns: keyword research, targeting, ad copy and ongoing budget optimization, focused on getting conversions, not just clicks.

Projects.indexDescription: A few sites and systems I designed and built for clients, in production.
Projects.demoNote: The demo is free-tier hosted and may take a few seconds to wake up.

cristian-collection.title: Christian Collection
cristian-collection.description: Site for a jewelry business specializing in engagement and wedding rings with certified diamonds, with a catalog and service across Quito, Guayaquil and Cuenca.

optica-arichavala.title: Óptica Arichavala
optica-arichavala.description: Site for an optical store with state-of-the-art diagnostics, a frames catalog and personalized service.

tecnero.title: Tecnero
tecnero.description: A platform that digitizes the raw-material requirement and purchase order process for an LPG cylinder company, with role-based approval workflows. FastAPI backend.

About.title: Hi, I'm Mateo Guillén
About.intro: I'm a freelance web developer. I design and build websites, and I also make sure those sites get found: SEO, Google Analytics and Google Ads, all under one roof.
About.philosophy: I believe a website isn't done when it's published. That's why I integrate development with measurement and traffic acquisition from the start of the project, instead of treating them as separate services.
skills: Google Analytics 4 and Google Tag Manager
Deployment on Vercel and cloud platforms

Contact.title: Let's talk about your project
Contact.subtitle: Tell me what you need and I'll get back to you within 48 hours with next steps.

form.name: Name
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell me about your project, timeline and rough budget
form.successMessage: Thanks for reaching out. I'll reply to your email within 48 hours.
form.errorMessage: Something went wrong sending the message. Please try again or email me directly.

Contact.directTitle: You can also reach me directly
